channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] President Trump to address nation tonight on elections and voting machines
item.description: President Trump is set to address the nation tonight at 9 p.m. Eastern on elections and voting machines — calling it "really, really big news." What do you think he'll say?

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] FCC considers repealing longstanding TV broadcast ownership cap
item.description: The FCC is set to vote on repealing its TV station ownership cap, a move supporters say boosts competition but critics warn could fuel consolidation.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] American strikes reach Tehran Area as Iran threatens wider attacks
item.description: The U.S. reimposed a naval blockade on Iran as both sides exchanged attacks, fueling fears of wider war and rising global oil prices.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Meteorologist Greg Dee stops by the Sunrise Sale in St. Pete
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Meteorologist Greg Dee was doing live weather reports from the Sunrise Sale in St. Petersburg on Thursday morning.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Apollo Beach I-75 crash: Semi-truck spills lumber, causes southbound traffic delays
item.description: A semi-truck spilled a load of lumber across Interstate 75 Thursday morning, triggering traffic delays in the Apollo Beach and Riverview area, according to the Florida Highway Patrol.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] St. Pete's largest pajama party sends shoppers downtown before sunrise for 53-year bargain tradition
item.description: Shoppers traded sleeping in for savings Thursday morning as downtown St. Petersburg's annual Sunrise Sale returned for its 53rd year.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] 2 found dead during well-being check at Port Charlotte home
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Major US-17 crash claims one life Thursday morning
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Frontier adds these flights from Fort Lauderdale starting at $99
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] More Vibrio vulnificus in Florida, 'flesh-eating' cases up to 10
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] What is the origin of cyclosporiasis outbreak? 96 cases in Florida
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] JetBlue dropping one Florida airport, ending routes at 2 others
[The Florida Channel] 7/16/26 Social Services Estimating Conference: Counties Contributions to Medicaid
item.description: 7/16/26 Social Services Estimating Conference: Counties Contributions to Medicaid first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/16/26 Social Services Estimating Conference: Counties Contributions to Medicaid first appeared on The Florida Channel

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] TRAFFIC ALERT: Cypress Gardens Blvd. in Winter Haven partially closed after semi-truck crash
item.description: Winter Haven Police said all eastbound lanes of Cypress Gardens Blvd are shut down after a semi-truck crash.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Dangerous wildfire smoke chokes Midwest and Northeast
item.description: Wildfires in Canada forced thousands to evacuate Minnesota’s Boundary Waters as dangerous smoke and extreme heat spread across the Midwest and Northeast.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Carry-on costs
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises travelers to compare the full cost of flights, including baggage and seat fees, before booking.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 16
item.description: Nurse practitioner gives produce safety tips during outbreak. Plus, woman accused of putting newborn baby in trash can at UT out on bond.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Stock market rally fueled by transportation stocks and AI excitement on Wall Street
item.description: Transportation stocks and AI are fueling a Wall Street rally, but experts say long-term planning matters more than chasing trends.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Tampa towing company sued over $250 fee charged before county's required 48-hour waiting period
item.description: A proposed class-action lawsuit alleges a Tampa towing company repeatedly charged drivers a $250 fee in violation of a Hillsborough County ordinance and that more than 1,000 people may have been affected.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] 9-foot alligator cools off in pool of Venice home
item.description: A Venice homeowner got quite the wake-up call when a 9-foot, 4-inch alligator pushed through the home’s screened enclosure before taking an early morning dip in the pool, according to the Venice Police Department.

item.title: [Tampa Bay Beacon (Pinellas)] Lakewood High caps three-year turnaround effort with A grade

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Man arrested for St. Pete attempted murder after attacking, disfiguring victim: SPPD
item.description: St. Petersburg police have charged a man with attempted murder on Tuesday after attacking and disfiguring the victim at Bartlett Park, authorities said.
